_meta.comment: PLACEHOLDER candidate capture for #0000 A/B matcher-quality gate. Capturing the true candidate requires launching the Unreal Editor with the S3 C++ BM25-lite matcher live, rebuilding the tool catalog, and dumping top-K per query. That workflow is not available in this non-interactive environment, so this file ships alongside tool_catalog_baseline.json as a documented placeholder. Per test-plan.md section 5 the operator performs the capture before merging the PR and replaces this placeholder content with real results.
capture_procedure: 1. Check out this branch with S4 landed (python removals complete).
2. Launch UnrealEditor with the Claireon plugin loaded.
3. Open the Claireon REPL / diagnostics widget and trigger claireon.tools_search once to warm the C++ matcher.
4. For each non-blank, non-comment line in tool_catalog_ab_queries.txt, execute:
5. Record {query: [top-5 tool_name strings in rank order]} into this file's 'results' object.
6. Compute per-query top-5 intersection against tool_catalog_baseline.json; average across all 20 queries.
7. Gate: average intersection >= 70% or explicit per-query justification in the PR description.
